overall.description: First-person exploration through a dystopian urban waterfront in heavy rain and dense fog. The player character walks from a street intersection through abandoned overgrown areas and up to a busy elevated promenade lined with homeless encampments, market stalls, and neon advertising, showcasing the atmospheric cyberpunk environment of Night City.

events.description: crossing wet asphalt road with yellow crosswalk lines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the foggy intersection toward the elevated highway structure

tall palm trees silhouetted against the foggy sky
rain-slicked black asphalt with reflective puddles
faded yellow painted lines marking pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy, rain-soaked street intersection beneath a massive elevated highway structure. The camera moves forward across wet asphalt marked with yellow crosswalk lines, with palm trees visible through the haze and industrial structures looming in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge walkway with concrete railing overlooking industrial zone

events.description: descending from bridge walkway to overgrown grassy embankment

agents.ego_description: walking along the bridge railing then descending toward abandoned industrial buildings

low concrete industrial structures with smokestacks emitting smoke

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a concrete bridge walkway with a low railing, overlooking an industrial area with smoking smokestacks. The path descends from the bridge to an overgrown grassy embankment with abandoned concrete structures visible through the rain and fog.

tall wild grass and weeds covering the ground

narrow muddy trail through the grass

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a narrow, overgrown path between a tall concrete retaining wall and abandoned buildings. Tall grass and weeds line the muddy dirt trail as the camera moves through this neglected industrial back area with palm trees swaying in the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated promenade entrance with homeless encampment

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to the promenade level
small green and gray dome tent set up beside the path
modern curved street light illuminating the area
blue-green metal railing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends concrete stairs from the overgrown lower area to an elevated promenade, passing a green camping tent and a homeless person resting on the gravel. The scene opens onto a concrete walkway with modern street lamps and a metal railing overlooking the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy waterfront promenade with market stalls and digital advertising

passing large digital advertising kiosk with illuminated screen

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy promenade past market vendors and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: child in orange jacket running ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall illuminated digital billboard displaying video advertisements
street vendors with goods displayed on tables and tarps
glowing blue and white neon signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: The promenade opens into a bustling waterfront area with moderate crowds, market stalls, and bright digital advertising kiosks. The camera moves past a child running ahead and various pedestrians browsing vendor stalls, with neon signs illuminating the rainy evening atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under concrete overpass with industrial views

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past people sitting on benches and smoking

simple concrete seating along the walkway wall
tall factory smokestacks emitting dark smoke visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a darker, covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The lighting shifts to artificial as the camera passes people sitting on benches and smoking, with industrial smokestacks visible through the fog beyond the railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, rain-soaked industrial intersection into a bustling, neon-lit urban promenade. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, moving across wet asphalt and through dense fog toward a concrete bridge that overlooks smoking industrial stacks. As the camera descends from the bridge, the environment shifts into a neglected back area of muddy trails and overgrown grass squeezed between tall retaining walls and abandoned buildings. The scene then ascends a set of concrete stairs past a makeshift encampment, opening onto an elevated waterfront walkway where the gloom gives way to bright digital kiosks, market stalls, and crowds of pedestrians. Finally, the camera moves away from the neon lights into a darker, covered walkway beneath a concrete overpass, where artificial lighting illuminates people resting on benches against a backdrop of distant, foggy smokestacks.
